name: read-aloud
description: A powerful and lightweight Chrome extension that instantly reads aloud webpage content with natural-sounding text-to-speech voices. Supports 40+ languages, customizable playback controls, and seamless accessibility features for an enhanced web browsing experience.

scripts.start: echo 'Launching Read Aloud extension in development mode...'
scripts.build: npm run lint && npm run package
scripts.package: zip -u -r build/package.zip _locales css img js sound page-scripts *.html manifest.json README.md LICENSE || true
scripts.sync-page-scripts: rsync -avz js/messaging.js page-scripts/ && aws s3 sync --profile s3 --delete --metadata-directive REPLACE --cache-control max-age=86400,public page-scripts s3://lsdsoftware-assets/read-aloud/page-scripts
scripts.prepare-release: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run build
